Diancie

#0718 Zygarde #0720 Hoopa
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Diancie is a Rock/Fairy type Pokémon introduced in Generation 6.

Diancie is an event-exclusive Pokémon. It also has a Mega Evolution, available in Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire and Pokémon Go.

Diancie Mega Diancie

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0719
Type Rock Fairy
Species Jewel Pokémon
Height 0.7 m (2′04″)
Weight 8.8 kg (19.4 lbs)
Abilities 1. Clear Body
Local № 0151 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0231 (Legends: Z-A)

Training

EV yield 1 Defense, 2 Sp. Def
Catch rate 3 (0.4% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 300
Growth Rate Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Undiscovered
Gender Genderless
Egg cycles 25 (6,169–6,425 steps)

Evolution chart

  • Diancie does not evolve.

Diancie changes

  • In Generations 6-7, Diancie has a base experience yield of 270.
  • In Generations 6-7, Diancie has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

X
Omega Ruby		 A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

Egg moves

Diancie does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

diamond
precious stone
ishi
